homekey.title: Configure HomeKey
homekey.description: All shades on a PowerView network share the same encryption key. The recommended method is to fetch it from your G3 hub. You can also enter the key manually, or skip if your shades are unencrypted.

data_description.hub_url: Base URL of your PowerView G3 hub, e.g. http://powerview-g3.local

homekey_bluetooth.title: Configure HomeKey for {name}
homekey_bluetooth.description: This shade uses encryption. The recommended method is to fetch the key from your G3 hub. You can also enter it manually, or skip (controls will be disabled until a key is configured).

data_description.hub_url: Base URL of your PowerView G3 hub, e.g. http://powerview-g3.local

auto_add_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

select_device.title: Select Shades
select_device.description: Select the PowerView shades to add via Bluetooth.

manual.title: Enter Device Details
manual.description: No PowerView shades were found via Bluetooth. Enter the device details manually.

error.invalid_key_format: HomeKey must be a valid hexadecimal string
error.invalid_key_length: HomeKey must be exactly 32 hex characters (16 bytes)
error.hub_connection_error: Cannot connect to the PowerView hub
